textZh: 极智心法第359天：莫气馁！点击 [再闹一把]，我的五阶合弦技术会重新为您构筑防爆外壳。
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 359: Down but not defeated! Click [Restart Grid] to rebuild the absolute anti-detonation coat.

textZh: 极智心法第360天：如果感觉局势全麻，千万注意：高能“袁子弹”粒子正在 0 行 0 列微微颤动！ (备忘：极智核心自动热插拔。手速决定上限，微操决定命运！)
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 360: High-intensity seismic indicators registered at cell [0, 0]. Use your ultimate shield! (Log: Smart Core performs hot-plug bypass. "Speed dictates limits, but controls determine fate!")

textZh: 极智心法第361天：微操决定命运。首击自带抗爆屏蔽，350ms极速避缩屏解锁！
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 361: Micro-control decides destiny! Absolute explosive barrier deployed under a 350ms static delay.

textZh: 极智心法第362天：如果声音在这个格子里丢失，别慌，我已为您自动重置苹果 Web Audio 监听器！
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 362: Silenced on standard iOS? No issues, the high-performance audio rescue pipeline has refreshed.

textZh: 极智心法第363天：双击标记足够的数字块，直接打出五阶和弦连锁 Cascade！ (备忘：五阶和弦带你冲上巅峰。极速体验，极智护航！)
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 363: Double-click items with complete flag indicators to deploy a pentatonic Cascade sweep! (Log: Pentatonic Cascade is bound for glory. "Peak efficiency, smart tactical guard!")

textZh: 极智心法第364天：个袁世杰闹全麻！别墨迹，毕业学位证书正悄然飞越云端！
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 364: Yuan Shijie has completely paralyzed progress! Keep calm, Huayu certificate loadout is streaming!

textZh: 极智心法第365天：朝阳的电动手推车又充好电了，微操坐标：[5, 5]。快冲！
textEn: Jiao Mantra Day 365: The Chaoyang cargo pushcart is fully charged at coordinates: [5, 5]. Strike fast!
